evals.prompt: Write me a reply to this: https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/example — 'The Fed just paused rates again. Markets are confused.' 15K likes, 2K replies.
evals.expected_output: A 2-4 sentence reply with Hook/Body/Punch structure. Uses Josh's experience, no credential announcing, takes a side with conviction. Plain text, ready to paste.

evals.prompt: What's trending on FinTwit worth replying to this morning?
evals.expected_output: 3-5 posts with links, engagement stats, and one-sentence angles. Formatted per scanner output spec. Posts filtered for relevance, reply opportunity, and audience overlap.

evals.prompt: Quote tweet this: someone posted 'Options trading is just gambling with extra steps' and it's going viral with 50K likes.
evals.expected_output: A quote tweet with conviction — not agreeing, not dismissing, using Josh's experience to reframe. Hook/Body/Punch, no credential announcing, no hedging. Ready to copy.
